title: Kismaano
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Citation}} {{CelestialBody |image= |name=Kismaano |region=[[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} |sector=[[Cronese Mandate/Legends|Cronese Mandate]] |system=[[Kismaano system/Legends|Kismaano system]] |coordinates=S-6 |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited= |position= |moons= |routes=[[Kismaano Bypass]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class= |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate= |gravity= |terrain= |water= |interest= |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports= |affiliation=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] }} {{Quote|Have you ever seen anything to compare to this?''"
"''Well, there are some canyons on Luuq Two that are every bit as deep. Then there's Kismaano for cliffside dwellings. And, of course, Kashyyyk for trees…|[[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] and [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]|''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''}} '''Kismaano''' was a [[Planet/Legends|world]] in the [[Tion Cluster/Legends|Tion Cluster]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. ==History== A rich [[Mining/Legends|mining]] world on the [[Kismaano Bypass]], Kismaano had been part of the [[Kingdom of Cron]] and [[Xim's empire|Xim's Empire]], and by the era of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] it was a member of the [[Cronese Mandate/Legends|Cronese Mandate]]. Throughout its history, it had always stood apart from the rest of Cron, which had never trusted the planet's [[Merchant/Legends|merchants]]. A windswept world, Kismaano's oldest settlements were built into the sides of canyons and rifts. These cliffside dwellings had been tourist attractions for millennia, and were noted to be similar to those on [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]]. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' {{1stm}} *[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force (abridged audiobook)|''The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force'' abridged audiobook]] {{Mo}} ==Sources== *{{SW|url=news/essential-atlas-extra-the-history-of-xim-and-the-tion-cluster|text=Essential Atlas Extra: The History of Xim and the Tion Cluster|int=Xim Week: The History of Xim and the Tion Cluster}} *{{SW|url=news/the-essential-guide-to-warfare-authors-cut-part-3-xim-the-despot|series=Star Wars: The Essential Guide to Warfare Author's Cut|text=Part 3 - "Xim the Despot"}} ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Kismaano}} {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Kismaano }} [[Category:Cronese Mandate locations]] [[Category:Galactic Empire planets]] [[Category:Locations along the Kismaano Bypass]] [[Category:Mining planets]] [[Category:Planets in the Outer Rim Territories]] [[Category:Planets in the Slice]] [[Category:Terrestrial planets]]
